scope: In-place metadata repair of 939 published Pinterest pins (no recreation, no archive, no delete).

engine.verification: GET /v5/pins/{id} re-read after PATCH; title equality check.

blocker.pinterest_error_message: Your application does not have access to this restricted feature: pin_edit
remediation: Request 'pin_edit' / 'pins:write' restricted scope upgrade from Pinterest Developer support (currently Standard Access).
Once granted, re-run this engine: POST /functions/v1/pinterest-metadata-repair {action:'run', limit:50}. The same logic and identical generated titles/descriptions will be sent unchanged.
